title: pvpcomfy
description: Middle Click Pearl Legit/Non Cheat Version
body:
PVPComfy is a lightweight utility mod designed to enhance your gameplay experience.
It allows you to throw an Ender Pearl instantly by simply pressing the middle mouse button (scroll wheel), removing the need to manually switch hotbar slots.
Whether you are in a heated PVP battle or exploring the End, this mod saves you precious milliseconds.
The mod automatically searches your inventory for a pearl and uses it immediately.
